name: Mexican Dip in Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the hamburger and onion in a skillet until no longer pink.
2. Transfer the mixture to the crockpot.
3. Set the crockpot to high heat, then add cubed Velveeta cheese and stir occasionally until melted.
4. Add the stewed tomatoes and mushroom soup.
5. Stir to combine all ingredients thoroughly.
6. Reduce the heat setting to low to keep the dip warm.
